Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-27459 affecting package pyOpenSSL for versions less than 24.2.1-2
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-27459 affecting package pyOpenSSL for versions less than 24.2.1-2. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package pyOpenSSL is earlier than 24.2.1-2, affected by CVE-2026-27459
